feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Simulation of long-term lecanemab treatment effect on Alzheimer's disease progression.
drug.zh: 基于Clarity AD试验数据建模，预测仑卡奈单抗治疗可将早期AD进展至重度的时间延缓约4.5年。

drug.title: FDA Approval of Donanemab-azbt: A New Dawn in Alzheimer's Disease Treatment.
drug.zh: FDA批准donanemab靶向清除β-淀粉样蛋白，为阿尔茨海默病治疗带来新突破。

drug.title: Redirecting Alzheimer's disease therapeutics: Multitarget drugs and complementary non-pharmacological strategies.
drug.zh: 阿尔茨海默病治疗转向多靶点药物及非药物联合策略，但多数证据仍停留于临床前阶段。

drug.title: Macromolecular crowding inhibits degradation of alpha-synuclein amyloid fibrils induced by cathepsins and MMP9.
drug.journal: Protein science : a publication of the P
drug.zh: 大分子拥挤环境显著抑制免疫蛋白酶对α-突触核蛋白淀粉样纤维的降解。

drug.title: Neuroinflammation-centered pathophysiology and therapeutic strategy design in Alzheimer's disease: Cutting-edge developments.
drug.zh: 该综述确立神经炎症为AD核心驱动因素，并指出TREM2、NLRP3等通路是最具临床转化潜力的干预靶点。

drug.title: Evaluating emerging amyloid-β centric drugs for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease.
drug.zh: 新兴Aβ靶向疗法中，lecanemab与donanemab证实降低Aβ负荷可轻度减缓早期AD认知衰退。

drug.title: Novel hydroxytyrosol esters as potential anti-amyloid and neuroprotective agents for Alzheimer's disease.
drug.zh: 新型羟基酪醇酯通过增强稳定性和与Aβ40的相互作用，兼具抗淀粉样蛋白与神经保护活性。

drug.title: Optimizing Antibody-Based Therapies for Alzheimer's Disease: From Clinical Limitations to Molecular Engineering Innovations.
drug.zh: 分子工程改造抗体可突破阿尔茨海默病免疫疗法疗效与安全性瓶颈。

mech.title: Plasma GDF15 affects long-term dementia risk and alters neuroimmune signaling.
mech.zh: 血浆GDF15通过调控神经免疫信号，长期增加痴呆风险，尤其与血管性痴呆关联更强。

mech.title: Plasma and CSF adiponectin levels in biomarker-confirmed Alzheimer's disease: A cross-sectional study in a tertiary memory clinic.
mech.zh: 生物标志物确诊的阿尔茨海默病患者血浆总脂联素升高，但CSF/血浆比值降低，提示外周与中枢脂联素分布失衡。

mech.title: Alzheimer's Protection by PLCγ2 Compacts Plaques, Redistributes Microglia, and Protects Synapses in AppNL -G-F Mice.
mech.zh: PLCγ2-R522变异通过压缩斑块、重塑小胶质细胞分布并保护突触，在AppNL-G-F小鼠中发挥阿尔茨海默病保护作用。

mech.title: Study on Regulatory Mechanism of Gastrodia elata Specific microRNA Targeting JNK3 in Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 天麻特异性miRNA通过抑制JNK3减少Tau磷酸化与氧化应激，为阿尔茨海默病提供新机制。

mech.title: Multitarget Actions of Pentacyclic Triterpenic Acids in Alzheimer's Disease: Mechanistic Insights.
mech.zh: 五环三萜酸通过多靶点机制（降低Aβ和tau、改善线粒体功能、抑制炎症）发挥阿尔茨海默病神经保护作用。

mech.title: Curcumin, Coenzyme-Q10, and Bioactive Compounds in Ashwagandha Extract: Multi-Targeting Potential of Co-Administered Natural Health Compounds as Therapeutic and Preventative Interventions in Alzheimer's and Parkinson's Disease Models.
mech.zh: 姜黄素、辅酶Q10与南非醉茄提取物联用通过多靶点机制在阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病模型中展现治疗与预防潜力。

mech.title: The Multiple Functions of Amyloid Beta in the Gut Epithelium and the Role of the Microbiota: A Study in the APP/PS1 Animal Model Subjected to Chronic Synbiotic Treatment.
mech.zh: APP/PS1小鼠慢性合生元干预揭示肠道Aβ多重功能及菌群调控屏障与免疫保护作用。

mech.title: From Genes to Imaging Phenotypes: Radiomics and Machine Learning as Tools to Decode Molecular Pathways in Alzheimer's Disease.
mech.zh: 影像组学与机器学习可解码阿尔茨海默病基因-分子通路，实现从基因到影像表型的转化。

dx.title: Plasma p-tau217 best captures early longitudinal cognitive changes in subjective cognitive decline compared with p-tau181 and NfL.
dx.zh: 血浆p-tau217较p-tau181和NfL更能预测主观认知下降者早期纵向认知变化。

dx.title: [18F]RO948 Tau PET in early and late onset Alzheimer's disease: associations with plasma p-tau 217, atrophy and cognition.
dx.journal: European journal of nuclear medicine and
dx.zh: 早发型与晚发型阿尔茨海默病tau蛋白沉积模式不同，且均与血浆p-tau217及认知衰退显著相关。

dx.title: Discovery-Driven Plasma Proteomics Identifies a Multi-Protein Signature for Amyloid PET Positivity: A Machine Learning Analysis of the Bio-Hermes Cohort.
dx.zh: 基于血浆蛋白质组学与机器学习，发现一个由5种蛋白组成的特征可有效识别脑内淀粉样蛋白PET阳性状态。

dx.title: Diagnostic Performance and Clinical Utility of Automated Plasma Amyloid-β 1-42/1-40 Assay.
dx.zh: 自动化HISCL血浆Aβ42/40比值在真实世界中对AD连续谱诊断性能良好，优于Simoa。

dx.title: Machine Learning-Based Multiclass Classification of Cognitive Stages Using Plasma Biomarkers, Clinical Assessments, and Genetic Features: A Repeated, Nested Cross-Validation Study in ADNI with External Evaluation in CNTN.
dx.zh: 血浆生物标志物与临床量表融合的多分类增益主要源于标签循环性，而非独立生物学信号。

dx.title: Diet Quality and Dementia Risk in Older Adults With Alzheimer Pathology.
dx.zh: 高饮食质量可降低阿尔茨海默病理阳性老年人的痴呆风险，且独立于神经退行性及胶质病理标志物水平。

dx.title: Correction: Plasma Aβ42/p-Tau217 ratio and p-Tau217 independently predict CSF-defined Alzheimer's disease pathology in a Brazilian admixed cohort.
dx.zh: 血浆Aβ42/p-Tau217比值与p-Tau217在巴西混合人群中独立预测脑脊液定义的阿尔茨海默病病理。

dx.title: Plasma Biomarkers for Alzheimer's Disease Across the Continuum: A Systematic Review of SIMOA-Based Studies.
dx.zh: 基于SIMOA技术的血浆标志物（Aβ42/40、p-Tau217、GFAP等）可有效区分阿尔茨海默病连续谱各阶段。

prev.title: Altered brain glucose metabolism and connectivity in young adults with obstructive sleep apnea.
prev.zh: 年轻阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停患者已出现类似阿尔茨海默病的前额叶-顶叶低代谢及小脑高代谢。

prev.title: Identification, multi-modal characterisation and clinical outcomes of pre-atrial fibrillation sub-classes.
prev.zh: 房颤前状态按结构、电生理及生物标志物分层后，参数异常越多，主要不良心血管事件风险越高。

prev.title: Plasma GDF15 affects long-term dementia risk and alters neuroimmune signaling.
prev.zh: 血浆GDF15通过调控神经免疫信号，长期增加痴呆风险，尤其与血管性痴呆关联更强。

prev.title: Associations between wearable-device-measured daytime and nighttime light exposures and dementia risk: A prospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 可穿戴设备测得的夜间光照暴露升高与痴呆风险增加显著相关，而日间强光暴露则降低风险。

prev.title: The Role of Gut Microbiome in Mild Cognitive Impairment: A Twin Study.
prev.zh: 双胞胎研究揭示，轻度认知障碍患者肠道中毛螺菌科丰度显著降低，提示该菌群可能是关键靶点。

prev.title: Attention Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder and Risk of Dementia: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
prev.zh: ADHD病史显著增加全因痴呆及阿尔茨海默病风险，HR约2.5-3.0。

prev.title: Polyphenols Suppress Intracellular Zinc Deficiency-Induced ROS Production and NLRP3 Inflammasome Activation in Microglial and Neuronal Cells.
prev.zh: 多酚通过抑制胞内锌缺乏诱导的ROS与NLRP3炎症小体激活，保护小胶质和神经元细胞。

prev.title: Use of Wearable Technology for Measuring and Characterizing Sedentary Behavior in People With Mild Cognitive Impairment and Dementia: Systematic Review.
prev.zh: 可穿戴设备客观揭示轻度认知障碍与痴呆患者久坐行为模式，优于传统自我报告法。

intro.title: From Tradition to Translation: A Critical Appraisal of Bacopa monnieri for Neuroprotection from Preclinical and Clinical Perspectives and Challenges in Utilization.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是假马齿苋这种草药能否帮大脑抵抗老化、预防痴呆，对普通人来说，就是看它能不能成为日常护脑的天然帮手。

intro.title: Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and Glioblastoma (GBM): Shared Mechanisms and Therapeutic Insights.
intro.zh: 这篇综述对比了老年痴呆和脑癌里大脑发炎的相同与不同，帮普通人理解炎症如何影响这两种病，以及未来可能的治疗方向。

intro.title: Battling Parkinson's and Alzheimer's: The Neuroprotective Power of Carnosic Acid.
intro.journal: Journal of biochemical and molecular tox
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是迷迭香里的一种天然成分如何保护大脑、对抗帕金森和阿尔茨海默病，帮你了解日常饮食中可能存在的护脑选择。

intro.title: IL-4 in Alzheimer's Disease-Mechanisms and Therapeutic Potential.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫IL-4的免疫信号物质，对阿尔茨海默病既有好处也有坏处，帮你了解它未来能否成为治疗新思路。

intro.title: Next-generation intranasal delivery nano-platforms for targeted brain therapy of Alzheimer's disease.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是通过鼻子喷药直接送进大脑治阿尔茨海默病的新方法，普通人能了解未来可能不用打针吃药的新疗法。

intro.title: Targeting Brain Cholesterol Homeostasis in Alzheimer's Disease: Mechanisms and Therapeutic Perspectives.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里的胆固醇乱套会加速老年痴呆，看懂它，你就能明白为啥控油、护脑能防病。

intro.title: [Advances in Anti-Dementia Therapies in Older Adults].
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲了老人痴呆症治疗的新进展，包括新药和日常护理方法，能帮普通人了解怎么延缓病情、改善生活。

intro.title: Molecular Mechanisms Underlying Alzheimer's Disease Pathogenesis: Comprehensive Overview.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是老年痴呆是怎么一步步变严重的，看懂它，能帮你更清楚怎么预防和延缓病情。
